body: {`${entry.id}-${index}`} onClick={() => openModal(entry, true)} className="hover:bg-slate-50/70 transition-colors cursor-pointer"> {formatDateTh(entry.date)} {entry.id} {entry.items?.length || 0} e.stopPropagation()}>
{`skeleton-${i}`} className="animate-pulse">

{`${c.id}-${index}`} onClick={() => openModal(c, true)} className="hover:bg-slate-50/70 transition-colors cursor-pointer"> {c.id} {c.name} {c.type === 'Regular' ? 'ลูกค้าทั่วไป' : c.type} {c.phone || '-'} {c.status === 'Active' ? '✔ ยินยอม' : 'ระงับข้อมูล'} e.stopPropagation()}>

{`${p.id}-${index}`} onClick={() => openModal(p, true)} className="hover:bg-slate-50/70 transition-colors cursor-pointer"> {p.id} {p.name} {p.category} {p.buyPrice ? `${Number(p.buyPrice).toLocaleString()} ฿` : '-'} /{p.unit} {p.status === 'Active' ? '✔ ใช้งาน' : 'ยกเลิก'} e.stopPropagation()}>
{`skeleton-${i}`} className="animate-pulse">

{idx} className="hover:bg-slate-50/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer group"> {item.id} {item.moduleName} {item.icon} {item.typeText} {item.customer} {Number(item.weight || 0).toLocaleString()} {item.unit || 'กก.'}
{`skeleton-${i}`} className="animate-pulse">
{`skeleton-${i}`} className="animate-pulse">
